overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic desert city at sunset. The journey begins at the 'Ash' street intersection, continues through highways with holographic billboards and floating advertisements, and ends at a downtown parking garage. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with neon signage, palm trees, mountain backdrops, and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with overhead street sign

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green allowing vehicle to proceed
accelerating through the intersection passing under the Ash street sign

agents.ego_description: waiting at red light at Ash intersection then accelerating through as the light changes

notable_agents.action: crossing the street in front of the vehicle at the crosswalk
black car passing through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large green overhead street sign displaying 'Ash' in white letters
tall red industrial structure with corrugated metal walls and large signage
row of palm trees lining the left side of the street
large desert mountains with reddish rock formations in the distance
suspended traffic signal showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits at a red light at the Ash street intersection in a futuristic desert city. As the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates forward, passing under the large green street sign. A pedestrian crosses in front of the vehicle, and other cars pass through the intersection. The scene is bathed in warm golden hour light with palm trees and red industrial buildings visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with holographic advertisements and exit ramps

events.description: passing large black smoke plume rising from floating structure in the sky
taking the Arroyo exit ramp and turning right onto E Valley street

agents.ego_description: cruising down the highway passing holographic billboards then taking the Arroyo exit

notable_agents.action: silver car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large rectangular holographic advertisement floating in the sky with changing images
brown highway exit sign displaying 'Arroyo' in white letters
thick black smoke rising from a floating platform or aircraft
metal guardrails lining the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives down a multi-lane highway passing futuristic floating holographic billboards. Black smoke rises from a damaged floating structure in the sky to the right. The vehicle approaches and takes the Arroyo exit, turning right while passing the exit sign. The desert mountains remain visible to the left as the vehicle transitions from the main highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban downtown with towering skyscrapers

events.description: entering dense downtown area with tall glass skyscrapers replacing open highway
entering shadow cast by tall buildings reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: navigating through downtown streets surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture

notable_agents.action: red van turning at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: green street sign displaying 'E Valley' mounted on a pole
tall futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
raised monorail or train track structure running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the dense downtown district, leaving the open highway behind. Towering glass skyscrapers with neon billboards line both sides of E Valley street, creating an urban canyon effect. The lighting shifts as the vehicle enters the shadow of the tall buildings. Other vehicles and scattered pedestrians populate the street, and an elevated train track is visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking garage entrance with security checkpoint

events.description: stopping at red traffic light before the parking garage entrance
pedestrians crossing in the crosswalk in front of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: approaching the parking garage and stopping at red light while pedestrians cross

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the marked crosswalk

entered.detail: large dark industrial parking facility with multiple levels and red neon lighting
security checkpoint structure at the entrance to the facility
red and white striped barrier arm at the parking entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a large dark parking garage structure with red neon accent lighting. The vehicle slows and stops at a red traffic light before the security checkpoint. Several pedestrians cross in front of the vehicle using the marked crosswalk. The surrounding area features industrial buildings and security barriers, with the scene illuminated by streetlights and the facility's red neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transitions from a sun-drenched desert intersection into the shadowed, neon-lit depths of a futuristic downtown district. It begins at the Ash street intersection, where the vehicle accelerates through a golden-hour glow past palm trees and industrial buildings as the light turns green. As the vehicle merges onto a multi-lane highway, the open horizon reveals desert mountains and floating holographic billboards, before the camera follows a right turn at the Arroyo exit. The scene then shifts abruptly from the open road into a dense urban canyon of towering glass skyscrapers and neon signage, where the warm sunlight fades into the cool shadows of E Valley street. Finally, the vehicle slows as it approaches a dark parking garage, moving from the bustling city street toward a security checkpoint illuminated by stark red neon accents and industrial streetlights.
